texto: I don't eat & drink good clean food because I want my body to look more like Taylor Swift's. Actually, I am among a rare breed of humans that knows my worth is not determined by the size of my ass. That said, I eat and drink clean food because I love myself. Besides, when I eat shitty food, I feel like shit. Period. When I eat refined sugar and a bunch of processed foods, my mind gets all foggy and my body feels lethargic. No thanks! I mean, how am I supposed to change the world for the better feeling like that?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brooke Hampton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't eat & drink good clean food because I want my body to look more like Taylor Swift's. Actu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, health, drink pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e reflexao.
